requirement_topic.en: BPC Grid Connection — 230/400 V, 50 Hz and High-Altitude Derating
requirement_topic.zh: BPC并网接入——230/400 V、50 Hz及高海拔降额
requirement_topic.zht: BPC併網接入——230/400 V、50 Hz及高海拔降額

summary.en: Bhutan Power Corporation (BPC) is the national transmission and distribution utility for most grid-connected electricity supply in Bhutan, under electricity-sector regulation by the Bhutan Electricity Authority (BEA). EV charger projects should confirm BPC site-connection conditions, metering, load capacity, earthing, protection coordination, harmonic limits, commissioning tests, and any operator or tariff requirements before installation. Bhutan's public supply should be treated as 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, with a hydro-dominant generation mix and India-interconnected grid context. Many deployment sites are at high altitude, so chargers, power modules, insulation clearances, cooling systems, and cable assemblies need altitude and thermal derating review.
summary.zh: 不丹电力公司（BPC）是不丹大多数并网供电的国家输配电公用事业单位，电力行业由不丹电力管理局（BEA）监管。电动汽车充电桩项目在安装前应确认BPC现场接入条件、计量、负荷容量、接地、保护配合、谐波限值、调试测试，以及任何运营方或电价要求。不丹公共供电应按230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz处理，电力结构以水电为主并与印度电网互联。许多部署地点处于高海拔环境，因此充电桩、功率模块、绝缘间隙、冷却系统和电缆组件需要进行海拔及热降额审查。
summary.zht: 不丹電力公司（BPC）是不丹大多數併網供電的國家輸配電公用事業單位，電力行業由不丹電力管理局（BEA）監管。電動汽車充電樁項目在安裝前應確認BPC現場接入條件、計量、負荷容量、接地、保護配合、諧波限值、調試測試，以及任何運營方或電價要求。不丹公共供電應按230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz處理，電力結構以水電為主並與印度電網互聯。許多部署地點處於高海拔環境，因此充電樁、功率模組、絕緣間隙、冷卻系統和電纜組件需要進行海拔及熱降額審查。

standards_or_laws: Bhutan Electricity Authority electricity-sector regulation and licensing requirements
Bhutan Power Corporation grid-connection and installation acceptance requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
Project-specific BPC connection agreement, metering, protection, and commissioning conditions

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly validated against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC charging communication, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China's domestic low-voltage baseline is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Bhutan has the same 50 Hz frequency as China but a different 230/400 V nominal voltage, so a China domestic 220/380 V design still requires input-range, protection-threshold, transformer, rectifier, cable, and thermal validation for Bhutan.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流充电通信GB/T 27930-2023，以及当地电网运营商项目验收进行验证。中国国内低压基线为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。不丹与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压为230/400 V而非中国220/380 V，因此中国国内220/380 V设计仍需针对不丹确认输入范围、保护阈值、变压器、整流器、电缆和热性能。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流充電通訊GB/T 27930-2023，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收進行驗證。中國國內低壓基線為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。不丹與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓為230/400 V而非中國220/380 V，因此中國國內220/380 V設計仍需針對不丹確認輸入範圍、保護閾值、變壓器、整流器、電纜和熱性能。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) rated input range covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz; (2) protection thresholds, leakage-current devices, surge protection, metering, and harmonic performance are configured for BPC conditions; (3) power modules and cooling are derated for high-altitude Himalayan sites; (4) clearances, creepage, insulation coordination, and enclosure ventilation remain valid at altitude; (5) single-line diagrams, load calculations, commissioning records, and maintenance procedures are acceptable to BPC and BEA where required. Do not state that Bhutan's grid is the same as China's: only the 50 Hz frequency is shared; the voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认：(1) 额定输入范围覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 保护阈值、漏电保护器件、浪涌保护、计量和谐波性能按BPC条件配置；(3) 功率模块和冷却系统针对喜马拉雅高海拔场址降额；(4) 电气间隙、爬电距离、绝缘配合和外壳通风在高海拔下仍然有效；(5) 单线图、负荷计算、调试记录和维护程序在需要时可被BPC和BEA接受。不得声称不丹电网与中国匹配：仅50 Hz频率相同；电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認：(1) 額定輸入範圍覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 保護閾值、漏電保護器件、浪湧保護、計量和諧波性能按BPC條件配置；(3) 功率模組和冷卻系統針對喜馬拉雅高海拔場址降額；(4) 電氣間隙、爬電距離、絕緣配合和外殼通風在高海拔下仍然有效；(5) 單線圖、負荷計算、調試記錄和維護程序在需要時可被BPC和BEA接受。不得聲稱不丹電網與中國匹配：僅50 Hz頻率相同；電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory or project-specific — grid-connected installations require BPC connection acceptance and must satisfy BEA electricity-sector requirements where applicable; voltage, power quality, metering, and high-altitude derating should be confirmed for each site
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a BPC or BEA approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Bhutan 230/400 V, 50 Hz

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Bhutan-ready charger package needs BPC site-connection acceptance, 230/400 V input-range confirmation, IEC-family power-quality evidence, and high-altitude derating documentation. China domestic 220/380 V evidence should not be described as matching Bhutan, even though both systems use 50 Hz.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向不丹的充电桩资料包需要BPC现场接入验收、230/400 V输入范围确认、IEC体系电能质量证据和高海拔降额文件。即使两地均为50 Hz，也不应将中国国内220/380 V证据描述为与不丹匹配。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向不丹的充電樁資料包需要BPC現場接入驗收、230/400 V輸入範圍確認、IEC體系電能質量證據和高海拔降額文件。即使兩地均為50 Hz，也不應將中國國內220/380 V證據描述為與不丹匹配。
